response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in software development, open-source contributions, and interdisciplinary project leadership. While his experience aligns well with the technical and architectural requirements of the role, his leadership experience is more hands-on than strategic, and his German proficiency is below the required C1 level. His background in mentoring, rapid technical assessment, and open-source technologies makes him a strong candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development, architecture design, and open-source technologies (e.g., GISCollective platform).
Proven ability to mentor teams, conduct workshops, and share technical knowledge (e.g., Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos).
Strong technical versatility across languages (TypeScript, Python, DLang) and environments (Linux, Kubernetes, AWS).
concerns: Limited explicit experience in executive-level leadership or strategic client advisory roles.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' below the required C1 level for the role.
Most recent roles are based in Brazil, with no clear indication of experience in German or EU markets.
